text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I got me a fan letter! She said watchin' my races
and concerts made her real happy!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
This is some fantastic news! I'm tickled pink to
have somebody rootin' for me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I know just what to do! I'm gonna mosey on over
to this fan and give 'em a big ol' hug!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh! You wanna join me, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I desperately stop Taiki Shuttle before she leaves.
